summary.fr: Philosophe français de la morale et de la musique. Sur le pardon : il refuse le pardon facile ; certains crimes, restés sans repentir, demeurent impardonnables, et les pardonner trahirait les victimes.
summary.en: French philosopher of morality and music. On forgiveness: he refuses cheap forgiveness; some crimes, met with no repentance, remain unforgivable, and to forgive them would betray the victims.
